anatomy.description: Rounded card with drop shadow. Fixed width 374px. Height varies by configuration: 58px (Short action), 98px (Longer action).
16×16px icon rendered inside a 24×24px wrapper, placed inside a 32×32px pill-shaped container. Color communicates semantic type. Absent on type=neutral - no icon.
Single-line or 2-line message text. 14px Manrope Medium. Color: --text/placeholder (#636377).
Ghost pill button, 32px height. Triggers the single quick action (Undo, Retry, View, etc.).
32×32px icon button (× icon). Optional. Position differs by configuration: in Actions row (Short action) or Content row (Longer action).

types.name: info
types.description: Neutral informational message with a quick action.

types.name: error
types.description: Recoverable error with a corrective action (e.g. Retry).

types.name: warning
types.description: Non-blocking warning with an optional remediation action.

types.name: success
types.description: Lightweight success confirmation with a follow-up action (e.g. Undo, View).

types.name: neutral - no icon
types.description: Plain message with a quick action. No semantic color.

configurations.name: Short action
configurations.description: Content and action button on a single row. Use when the action label is 1–2 words.

configurations.name: Longer action
configurations.description: Content on top row, action button right-aligned on second row. Use when action label is 3+ words.

states.name: Visible
states.description: Mounted and displayed. Auto-dismiss timer may be running.

states.name: Dismissed
states.description: Unmounted or hidden. Triggered by auto-dismiss, action button press, or close button.

behavior.stackingBehavior: Do not stack. Replace or queue.

actionButton.notFor: Destructive operations, navigation flows, or multi-step tasks.

relatedComponents.name: Toast
relatedComponents.when: Passive confirmations or informational updates with no action needed.

relatedComponents.name: Alert Dialog
relatedComponents.when: High-risk, irreversible, or blocking interruptions requiring a decision.

relatedComponents.name: Standard Dialog
relatedComponents.when: Forms, multi-input tasks, and reversible flows.

notes: Token name --notification/warning--bg has a double dash — exact token name confirmed in Figma.
type=neutral - no icon increases padding-left to --spacing-16 (16px) since there is no icon container.
In the Longer action configuration, the close button moves from the Actions row to the Content row.
All icon container color tokens are fully confirmed for all 5 types.
